title: Senior Teacher - Schoolnet India - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Schoolnet India - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Join the Schoolnet India family as a Senior Teacher in Pune. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Schoolnet India:
Schoolnet India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Communication Skills

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Schoolnet India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
